Kath is all about generating flame stacks, which buff her cards up.
Playing a card with flame stacks will transfer 1 stack to one of her cards in hand, randomly.
Every flame stack expended generates combust stacks.
Hitting 10 combust stacks turns Solar Flare into Hyperflare, and gives 2 arithmetica.
More combust stacks = bigger hyperflare.
Having a basic understanding of kath won’t beat that stage, you kinda have to get to know that whole team cuz it barely functions <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
Since you're +12, might as well
You want to stack str high, stack combust high, then pop a 3-flame hyperflare for big damage.
Her corrosion scales with her atk

Kath exalt fetches kath cards from deck/discard and spreads flame stacks.
Kath posse fetches a kath card from deck/discard and puts flame on it. Also gives 1 arith.
Kath rouse gives you 1 more flame stack per turn and playing a 3-flame card returns it to your hand letting you loop it if you've managed your stacks well.
Unlike many assault/dps units she can actually put out pretty massive and consistent shielding.
Which is helpful since she can take a little longer to build up damage.
Kath is like... a fortified artillery piece.
At least, the way I play her. YMMV. You can play non tank Kath if you want.

You really wanna get her flame stacks ticking up asap
And you want to exalt as often as you can to further build up her stacks
Use last stand salvo at 3 stacks, then play strike/defend to shift stacks onto Salvo.
You wanna keep looping 3-stack salvos to build up str asap
Event kath will get a crit buff off of posse, so you may want to pop it before hyperflare.
Avoid playing 2-stack skills whenever possible.
Its a bit less efficient overall

Kath- dps of the team, her gimmick is fiamma stacks which buff and retain her cards, the max stacks is 3 and generally you want to play fiamma 1 or 3 cards. Playing them also adds stacks to you, and at 10 stacks solarflare becomes hyperflare which is her damage card.

Ryker- devs are trolling putting him in a no exploration stage, but he's your vuln source even if you have to gamble for it. Once you rouse him, every posse will generate a die that has a chance to vuln, he should probably be your 2nd rouse after kath.

Gramona- her exalt copies cards played on the previous turn, so use it after you dumped kath cards. The devs troll you a 2nd time by not setting kath posse for this team, so you either use gramona or double posse to get it, altho ig voices may be more important if ryker misses vuln.

Karen- weakness applier and exalt generates arith. You can use it to buff hyperflare's damage, or to play another card after hyperflare if needed.
